passives.name: Harmony
passives.effects: Grants {{as|heal and shield power}} equal to {{as|{{fd|0.5}}% '''bonus''' mana}}.

passives.name: Consonance
passives.effects: While you or any allied champion you granted a {{tip|heal}} or {{tip|shield}} to in the last 3 seconds is [[combat status|in combat]] with champions, each second, you heal the {{tt|most wounded|Lowest health percent}} allied champion within 900 units for {{as|{{fd|0.8}}% of your '''maximum''' mana}}.

effects_structured.raw: Grants {{as heal and shield power}} equal to {{as {{fd 0.5}}% '''bonus''' mana}}.

While you or any allied champion you granted a {{tip heal}} or {{tip shield}} to in the last 3 seconds is [[combat status in combat]] with champions, each second, you heal the {{tt most wounded Lowest health percent}} allied champion within 900 units for {{as {{fd 0.8}}% of your '''maximum''' mana}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Harmony grants heal and shield power equal to 0.5% of bonus mana at all times, including bonus mana gained from other sources.
Player-visible behavior: Consonance checks a rolling 3-second support window and only pulses while the caster or a recently healed/shielded ally is in champion combat.
Consonance resolves once per second to the lowest-health-percent allied champion within 900 units and scales each pulse from maximum mana.
